project_name: Karim's Money - Personal Finance Agent for UAE Residents
description: Multi-agent personal finance assistant that analyzes UAE bank statements (ADCB CSV format) and answers real-life money questions for expat families. Includes voice input via Compass Whisper, persistent question history, and a live agent activity panel showing critique loops between agents.

agents.name: Expense Analyzer
agents.role: Parses ADCB CSV bank statements, categorizes spend by merchant rules, computes monthly financial summary

agents.name: Risk Profiler
agents.role: Builds risk tolerance from income stability, dependents, employment tenure, and emergency buffer; critiques aggressive plans; flags expat visa-runway risk

agents.name: Goal Planner
agents.role: Classifies user query (goal_purchase / vacation / cut_expenses); drafts a costed plan; revises in response to Risk Profiler's critique

agents.name: Investment Advisor
agents.role: Matches risk band to UAE-specific products including Sharia-compliant options (ADCB Active Saver, DIB Sukuk, Sarwa)

agents.name: Compliance Recommender
agents.role: Synthesizes final user-facing answer; enforces SCA-compliant disclaimer; veto authority over plans that breach emergency-fund minimums

data_sources: Synthetic ADCB-format bank statements (CSV) in data/
